tools.name: deterministic-rules-engine
tools.description: Evaluates a citizen application against the deterministic rules captured in PostgreSQL (residency duration thresholds, income brackets, household size). Returns each rule's pass/fail and the cumulative eligibility score that grounds the LLM's recommendation.

tools.name: case-history-lookup
tools.description: Returns the citizen's prior application history (open + closed cases) from D365 Customer Service via the cases API. Used by the agent to detect duplicate or escalated applications and to attach the recommendation to the correct case.

tools.name: lineage-writer
tools.description: Persists the agent's grounding (prompts, model version, rule evidence, AI Act registry ID) to Microsoft Purview lineage and to the Confidential Ledger registry as required by EU AI Act Art. 26(6) for high-risk systems. The recommendation MUST NOT be returned to the caller until this write succeeds.

input.humanReviewRequired: boolean (must be true for this agent)

notes: Endpoints resolve from APIM (`Apim` install phase). Managed identity is the per-country `udcsp-<country>-eligibility-uami` provisioned by `Install-Identity`. The agent contract is enforced by Foundry Content Safety (see agent.yaml) and by the per-tool rate limits set in APIM policy.
